title: peniocereus greggii
intro: Peniocereus greggii, also known as the Greggii Cactus, is a species of cactus native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Peniocereus greggii include relieving pain and inflammation, as well as reducing the severity of cold and flu symptoms. Herbal preparations of Peniocereus greggii can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to soothe skin irritations and respiratory issues.
